item.title: 一点 Python，一点点 Selenium，以及我与 Upwork 的第一支舞：一个成功解决技术难题的故事 | A Byte of Python, A Dash of Selenium, and My First Dance with Upwork: A Tale of Triumphant Tech Troubles
item.description:
欢迎各位代码战士、自动化爱好者和好奇的猫！ 拉起一把椅子，拿起你喜欢的饮料（如果是咖啡，我们已经是朋友了），然后把你的耳朵（或者，在这种情况下，眼睛）借给我。 我来这里是为了给你讲讲我在 Upwork 上自由职业的惊险（有时波涛汹涌）水域的处女航。 这是一个充满 Python、Selenium 和我不知道自己需要学习的人生课程的故事。 让我们系好安全带，好吗？

第 1 章：冒险的召唤

俗话说，每次冒险都始于一次点击。 对我来说，它是 Upwork 上的“注册”按钮。 我的意思是，当你有一个注册按钮时，谁还需要一封来自霍格沃茨的魔法信，对吧？ 注册过程就像 ABC 一样简单，或者在我们的例子中，就像声明一个变量一样简单。 我知道的下一件事是，我的个人资料已上线、生效并准备好采取行动。

第 2 章：机会之地（或缺乏机会？）

进入 Upwork 的土地后，我迫不及待地想在它的第一次迭代中使用while循环，准备循环遍历所有出现在我面前的职位发布。 但是，现实比 Python 中的KeyError更快地打击了我。 是的，有无数的机会，但每个机会都有自己的挑战。 需要的经验，我不具备的技能，可能还不如在不同维度的时区……我是不是在我的头上？

第 3 章：第一场演出

就在我以为自己迷失在绝望的无尽for中时，我偶然发现了一个似乎为我精心设计的机会。 客户需要 Python 自动化向导（或女巫，在我的例子中）来使用一些 Selenium 魔法。 这个演出就像 Python 打印函数中的f-string一样合适。 我鼓起勇气，起草了一份提案，然后点击“发送”。

第 4 章：过山车之旅开始

客户回应了，就像在小拉达田里发现一只闪亮的皮卡丘一样，我欣喜若狂！ 这项工作很简单：使用 Python 和 Selenium 自动执行一些任务。 简单吧？ 好吧，让我告诉你 - 生活并不像pip install selenium那样简单。 每一个错误都感觉像是来自 Chuck Norris 的回旋踢，但每次脚本成功运行时，就像找到了圣杯。

第 5 章：胜利

最后，我可以高兴地报告我的 Python 脚本和 Selenium 技能发挥了它们的魔力。 项目完成了，客户欣喜若狂，我感觉自己像个摇滚明星。 或者，我应该说，代码之星？

当我写这篇文章时，我的咖啡杯是空的，但我的心是满的。 通过 Upwork 的这段旅程教会了我更多，而不仅仅是提高我的 Python 和 Selenium 技能。 它教会了我韧性、适应性和破译含糊不清的客户指令的艺术（我相信你们中的许多人都能理解这一技能）。

结论

各位技术人员，在 Upwork 上做自由职业者有时感觉就像用一个精灵球驯服一只 Dragonite。 这很有挑战性，令人望而生畏，但是哦，这是值得的！ 因此，如果您站在边缘，考虑是否要潜入这些水域，请记住 - 每个成功的编码员都是从一行代码开始的。

这是喧嚣、打嗝和胜利的击掌

这一切的结束。 快乐编码，愿 Python 和 Selenium 的力量与您同在！

请记住，分享就是关怀，所以请随时在您的网络中传播这个故事！ 让我们激励更多的技术奇才开始他们的自由职业之旅。

请记住：这是一段旅程，而不是目的地。 每个错误都是一个教训，每个成功的脚本都是一次庆祝。 你有这个！



原文:

Welcome, fellow code warriors, automation aficionados, and curious cats! Pull up a chair, grab your beverage of choice (if it's coffee, we're already friends), and lend me your ears (or, in this case, eyes). I'm here to spin you a yarn about my maiden voyage into the thrilling (and occasionally choppy) waters of freelancing on Upwork. It's a tale filled with Python, Selenium, and life lessons I didn't know I needed to learn. Let's buckle up, shall we?

Chapter 1: The Call to Adventure

As the saying goes, every adventure starts with a single click. For me, it was the "Sign Up" button on Upwork. I mean, who needs a magical letter from Hogwarts when you have a sign-up button, right? The registration process was as simple as ABC, or in our case, as declaring a variable. The next thing I knew, my profile was up, live, and ready for action.

Chapter 2: The Land of Opportunities (Or lack thereof?)

Once in the land of Upwork, I was eager as a while loop on its first iteration, ready to loop through all the job postings that came my way. But, reality hit me faster than a KeyError in Python. There were countless opportunities, yes, but each came with its own challenges. Experience required, skills I didn't possess, time zones that might as well have been in different dimensions... Was I in over my head?

Chapter 3: The First Gig

Just when I thought I was lost in the endless for loop of despair, I stumbled upon an opportunity that seemed to be crafted for me. A client needed a Python automation wizard (or witch, in my case) to work some Selenium magic. The gig was as fit as f-string in a Python print function. I mustered my courage, drafted a proposal, and hit "Send."

Chapter 4: The Rollercoaster Ride Begins

The client responded, and much like finding a shiny Pikachu in a field of Rattatas, I was ecstatic! The job was straightforward: automate a few tasks using Python and Selenium. Simple, right? Well, let me tell you - life isn’t as easy as pip install selenium. Every single bug felt like a roundhouse kick from Chuck Norris, but every time a script ran successfully, it was like finding the Holy Grail.

Chapter 5: The Triumph

In the end, I can happily report that my Python scripts and Selenium skills worked their magic. The project was completed, the client was overjoyed, and I felt like a rockstar. Or, should I say, a code-star?

As I write this, my coffee cup is empty, but my heart is full. This journey through Upwork has taught me more than just improving my Python and Selenium skills. It taught me resilience, adaptability, and the art of deciphering vague client instructions (a skill I'm sure many of you can relate to).

Conclusion

Fellow techies, freelancing on Upwork might feel like taming a Dragonite with a single Poké Ball at times. It’s challenging, it's daunting, but oh, it’s rewarding! So, if you're standing at the edge, contemplating whether to dive into these waters, remember - every successful coder started with a single line of code.

Here's to the hustle, the hiccups, and the triumphant high-fives at

the end of it all. Happy coding, and may the force of Python and Selenium be with you!

Remember, sharing is caring, so feel free to spread this tale across your networks! Let's inspire more tech wizards to begin their freelancing journey.

Keep in mind: This is a journey, not a destination. Every bug is a lesson and every successful script, a celebration. You've got this!
item.author: jmgb27

item.title: 了解索罗班 | 恒星智能合约平台 | Understanding Soroban | Stellar Smart Contract Platform
item.description:
布万德什瓦尔

发表于 5 月 29 日

开源 Stellar 区块链支持国际商业交易。 您可以通过阅读本文了解更多有关智能合约的 Stellar 区块链开发及其应用案例等内容。

恒星区块链

此外，它允许任意两种货币之间的跨境货币兑换。 与其他加密货币一样，它通过区块链技术保持网络同步。

与其他基于区块链的金融访问和包容平台相比，Stellar 更高效、更快速且成本更低。 它为数字资产的发行和转移提供了一种快速且负担得起的解决方案。

恒星智能合约 (SSC)

智能合约通过集成用户界面和协议来定义和保护通过计算机网络的连接。 智能合约开发的目标和指导原则来自安全协议、经济理论和法律原则的概念。
恒星智能合约（SSC）是智能合约在恒星网络上的表达方式。 创建 SSC 时可以考虑并应用以下约束：

多重签名多重签名是指不同的人必须从一个帐户签署交易的概念。 人们还可以分配阈值和签名权重。

原子性/批处理

批处理是将多个操作组合到单个事务中的想法。 如果事务中的一个操作失败，则整个事务将因原子性而失败。

顺序

在 Stellar 网络上，序列号代表序列。 区块链利用这些序列号来规范交易，并确保在存在替代品时交易失败。

时限


时间限制限制了交易的有效期。 他们在 SSC 中表示句号。

当与 Stellar 网络的强大功能相结合时，Soroban on Stellar 将支持以扩展金融服务访问为中心的用例。 创始人为内置功能创建了这种新型智能合约平台。 现在，开发人员可以开始使用 Soroban 在测试系统上创建和部署智能合约，并可以从他们的工作中获得奖励。

创始人建立 Soroban 的目的是为了可扩展性、包含电池的开发人员体验以及通过 Stellar 网络可靠地访问金融渠道。

索罗班设计原则

内置电池创建 Soroban 的目的是为开发人员提供内置电池的体验。 开发人员可以直接访问他们快速启动和成功部署解决方案所需的资源。 因此，他们可以在本地独立运行和调试他们的合约，而无需 Stellar 网络的帮助。 还提供了一套全面有效的主机功能和内置合约以节省时间。 其中一个功能是内置高效的代币合约，无需复制和粘贴 ERC-20 合约。

可扩展性

可扩展性是 Soroban 的另一个想法。 该平台提供了立即支持并发的基础。 他们使用现代多核硬件同时进行群组交易。 智能合约开发过程很容易，因为平台没有编码和解码，这会消耗大量时间和计算机资源。

进入金融铁路


通过 Stellar 网络，Soroban 与金融网络建立了安全连接。 因此，开发人员可以充分受益于 Stellar 作为久经考验的网络的优势。

以下是 SSC 用例：
数字身份和 NFT开发人员可以将 Stellar 智能合约用于不可替代的代币 (NFT)。 人们可以将他们的游戏资产、证书、凭证等转换为 Stellar 区块链上的数字资产。 区块链存储这些资产的元数据。 去中心化金融（DeFi）


恒星智能合约 (SSC) 使去中心化金融 (DeFi) 解决方案，如借贷、代币化、支付应用程序等成为可能。 在这里，资产受 SSC 法规的约束。 在满足特定要求之前，计划不会公开这些材料。

恒星智能合约开发

正在寻找 Stellar 智能合约开发团队？ 联系我们的 Stellar 区块链开发人员团队，他们拥有使用 Soroban 设计和构建智能合约来构建智能合约的经验。

呃。 一旦暂停，bhuvan_deshwal 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，bhuvan_deshwal 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，bhuvan_deshwal 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 bhuvan_deshwal 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 bhuvan_deshwal 的方法：

降低 bhuvan_deshwal 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 bhuvan_deshwal 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Bhuvan Deshwal

Posted on May 29

The open-source Stellar blockchain enables international business transactions. Soroban has been pre-released on the blockchain to make it easier to construct and deploy Stellar smart contracts (SSC). You may learn more about this Stellar blockchain development for smart contracts, its application cases, and other things by reading this article.

Stellar Blockchain

Stellar is an open-source and decentralized global trading network that enables inexpensive transfers between digital currency and fiat money. Also, it allows cross-border currency exchanges between any two currencies. Like other cryptocurrencies, it keeps the network synchronized via blockchain technology.

Stellar is more efficient, speedier, and less expensive than alternative blockchain-based platforms for financial access and inclusion. The native cryptocurrency of Stellar for facilitating international transactions is called Stellar Lumens (XLM).
It provides a quick and affordable solution for the issuance and transfer of digital assets.

Stellar Smart Contracts (SSC)

Smart contracts define and secure connections via computer networks by integrating user interfaces and protocols. The goals and guiding principles of smart contract development come from concepts of secure protocols, economic theory, and legal principles.
Stellar smart contracts (SSCs) are how smart contracts are expressed on the Stellar network. Connected transactions within an SSC must adhere to various limitations in order to operate. The following constraints can be considered and applied when creating SSCs:

Multisignature Multisignature refers to a concept in which different people must sign transactions from an account. People can also assign thresholds and signature weights.

Atomicity/Batching

Batching is the idea of combining multiple operations into a single transaction. If one operation in a transaction fails, the entire transaction will fail due to atomicity.

Sequence

On the Stellar network, sequence numbers represent sequences. The blockchain utilizes these sequence numbers to regulate transactions and ensure that transactions fail if a substitute is present.

Time Bounds


Time bounds set limits on how long a transaction can be valid. They express periods in an SSC.

Soroban - a Smart Contract Platform

A smart contract platform for the Stellar network is called Soroban. The WASM (web assembly) and Rust-based Stellar network enables Soroban's Turing-complete smart contracts. Soroban on Stellar will enable use cases centred on extending access to financial services when combined with the power of the Stellar network. Founders created this new type of smart contract platform for the built-to function. A preview of Soroban is live on Futurenet. Now, developers can start creating and deploying smart contracts on a test system with Soroban and can earn rewards for their work.

Founders built Soroban for scalability, a battery-included developer experience, and reliable access to financial channels via the Stellar network.

Soroban Design Principles

Soroban's creators created it with the following three design tenets in mind:
Battery-included The intention behind creating Soroban is to provide developers with a battery-included experience. Developers have direct access to the resources they need to start quickly and deploy solutions successfully. A local sandbox will be available to Soroban developers for quick setup and iterative development. As a result, they can run and debug their contracts independently, locally, and without the assistance of the Stellar network. A comprehensive and effective set of host functions and built-in contracts are also available to save time. One such function is a built-in efficient token contract that eliminates the need to copy and paste ERC-20 contracts.

Scalability

Scalability is another Soroban idea. The platform provides a foundation that supports concurrency right away. Transaction dependencies in Soroban transactions include footprints. They conduct group transactions concurrently using modern multi-core hardware. Soroban does not have the majority of the deserialization and serialization loops. The smart contract development process is easy as the platform does not have encoding and decoding, which consumes significant time and computer resources.

Access to Financial Rail


Through the Stellar network, Soroban establishes secure connections to financial networks. The Soroban technology stack and ecosystem were merged by the Soroban creators. Developers can thus fully benefit from Stellar's advantages as a tried-and-true network.

Stellar Smart Contract Use Cases

The following are the SSC use cases:
Digital Identity and NFTs Developers can use Stellar smart contracts for non-fungible tokens (NFTs). People can convert their gaming assets, certifications, credentials, and more into digital assets on the Stellar blockchain. The blockchain stores the metadata of these assets. Stellar smart contract code configures the metadata to determine ownership and reassign the same with the NFT.

Decentralized Finance (DeFi)


Decentralised finance (DeFi) solutions, like as borrowing, lending, tokenization, payment apps, and more, are made possible by stellar smart contracts (SSCs). They are used by DeFi companies to safeguard the atomic escrow account. Here, the assets are governed by SSC regulations. Programmes won't disclose these materials until specific requirements have been met.

Stellar Smart Contract Development

Looking for a Stellar smart contract development team? Get in touch with our team of Stellar blockchain developers, who have experience building smart contracts utilizing Soroban to design and build smart contracts.

blockchain.oodles.io/blog/soroban-stell…
blockchain.oodles.io/services/

Er. Soumyajit Pan - May 29

Love In Store Technologies - May 29

Once suspended, bhuvan_deshwal will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, bhuvan_deshwal will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by bhuvan_deshwal will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If bhuvan_deshwal is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag bhuvan_deshwal:

Make all posts by bhuvan_deshwal less visible

bhuvan_deshwal consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging bhuvan_deshwal will restore default visibility to their posts.
